part.text:
---
## Goal
- Rename MaxEntries symbols to MaxQuotas across repository: ApiRateLimiterMaxEntries->ApiRateLimiterMaxQuotas, DefaultLimiterMaxEntries->DefaultLimiterMaxQuotas, defaultLimiterMaxEntries->defaultLimiterMaxQuotas, initDefaultLimiterMaxEntries->initDefaultLimiterMaxQuotas, TestDefaulLimiterMaxEntries->TestDefaulLimiterMaxQuotas
- Apply changes entire repository; project must typecheck

## Constraints & Preferences
- Terse bullets over paragraphs
- Preserve exact file paths and identifiers when known
- Project must still typecheck after change

## Progress
### Done
- Renamed `DefaultLimiterMaxEntries->DefaultLimiterMaxQuotas` in github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/ratelimit (29 references)
- Renamed `defaultLimiterMaxEntries->defaultLimiterMaxQuotas` in same package (3 references)
- Renamed `initDefaultLimiterMaxEntries->initDefaultLimiterMaxQuotas` in same package (2 references)
- Renamed `TestDefaulLimiterMaxEntries->TestDefaulLimiterMaxQuotas` in config_test.go (1 reference)

### In Progress
- Attempting to rename `Controller.ApiRateLimiterMaxEntries->ApiRateLimiterMaxQuotas` in github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/cmd/config

### Blocked
- Tool rejected the field rename with "reason": "new name is not a valid identifier"
- Previous upsert_decl attempt was fully rejected (generation 5, no changes applied)
- 29 total references to ApiRateLimiterMaxEntries still unresolved

## Key Decisions
- Used multiple rename operations for ratelimit package successfully before encountering field-specific issues
- Attempted upsert_decl on entire struct definition but that triggered cascading rewrites across all dependent files, leading to rejection
- Field rename tool appears to require special handling - diagnostics suggest "pass only the new member name; the receiver stays"

## Next Steps
1. Investigate alternative approach for renaming struct field ApiRateLimiterMaxEntries
2. Consider if field-level modification (set_body on just the field declaration portion) is viable
3. If no tool workaround exists, plan manual edit sequence for this single location

## Critical Context
- Error message: "reason": "new name is not a valid identifier", "escalation": "this exact call was already rejected; do not resend it unchanged"
- upsert_decl rejection produced diagnostics showing conflicts at line /boundary/internal/cmd/config/config.go:696-697 where ApiRateLimiterMaxEntries was being used
- Tool notes indicate rename tool "proves post-splice resolution: every rewritten reference must resolve to the renamed object; reference capture rejects even when the compiler is satisfied"

## Relevant Files
- /boundary/internal/cmd/config/config.go:219 (Controller struct field declaration)
- /boundary/internal/cmd/config/config.go:696-697 (field usage in initialization/assignment)
- /boundary/internal/ratelimit/config.go (5 renamed functions/var symbols successfully applied)
